description: Style Notedkny BDW Golden Delicious, a modern feast for the senses, comes in a sleek metal and glass apple bottle.Product DetailsThis juicy fragrance combines the scent of apple with a sophisticated blend of exotic flowers and sensual woodsCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSizeQuantity: 100 ml
